{{Infobox character
| name = G-42
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|turn off gravity}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Monarch]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|G-42 is an experimental creature created by [[Eternity Incorporated]]. Although it possesses a draconic head and six eyes, it was not intended to be a [[dragon]]; rather, it represents an attempt to manufacture a human being by combining different monster abilities and physical components. The entity is identified by a dark label tattooed onto its white skin. While G-42 is physically vulnerable and lacks the individual strength to defeat high-ranking beings like Archlords or [[Overlords]], it possesses a massive, distributed power. Instead of concentrating its energy in one place, G-42 projects its consciousness outward to establish connections with various systems, relics, and monsters across the globe. This ability allows it to seize control of external forces, making its true strength far greater than its physical form suggests.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|G-42 is a gold-and-white [[dragon]] created by [[Eternity]] as an attempt to fashion a human from monster parts and powers. This six-eyed creature features golden feathers and three eyes on each side of its head. Although it possesses the ability to turn off gravity, G-42 is weaker than an [[Overlord]] or [[Archlord]] when acting alone. To compensate for this, its power is distributed elsewhere to allow it to seize control of various systems, relics, and monsters. In this manner, the [[dragon]] functions much like a [[Monarch]] reigning over a world by itself.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[G-42]] is [[Eternity]]’s attempt at creating a human using monster parts and powers.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[G-42]] is a white [[dragon]] with golden feathers and three eyes on either side of its head.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[G-42]]'s power is spread out elsewhere to seize control of monsters, relics, and systems.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[G-42]] is weaker than an [[Archlord]] or [[Overlord]] on its own.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[G-42]] is a [[dragon]] with six eyes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[G-42]] has the power to turn off gravity.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[G-42]] is described as being like a [[Monarch]] reigning over a world alone.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[G-42]] is a gold-and-white [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[G-42]] is a [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“What are you talking about?” G-42 asked. Its six eyes burned, and all the equipment in the warehouse began to lift off the ground.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Where did it go?” the dragon asked, in utter confusion.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
